---
format: process_reveal
close_action: save
---

# HOOK
i trained a custom AI agent on my entire content corpus in 30 minutes.

# STEP 1
exported the last 200 posts as plain text. one file per post, fully dated, and source-tagged.

# STEP 2
ran a voice extraction pass with claude. output: a 3-page voice-profile.md with cadence, vocabulary, and 12 banned phrases.

# STEP 3
created a custom skill in claude code that loads the voice profile + 5 most recent posts before any drafting task.

# STEP 4
tested by drafting 5 posts side-by-side: agent-drafted vs from-scratch. picked winners on tone-match without knowing which was which.

# OUTCOME
agent-drafted won 4 of 5. tone-match was the deciding factor. now i ship 3x faster on social.

# CTA
save this and run the same 4 steps on your last 100 posts. takes one afternoon.
